text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer got injured, so I take her to the
infirmary just to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You really don't have to freak out so
much, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm telling you, I'm good. I appreciate the worry,
but I can get back to training, no biggie.
choice_data_list: There's no such thing as being too careful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Okay, how 'bout we compromise with a
sports wrap? That should be more than enough.
choice_data_list: I still think you should rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Okay, how 'bout we compromise with a
sports wrap? That should be more than enough.
choice_data_list: I still think you should rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I guess you have a point... Welp, guess I'll
head back and rest, then. Laters.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe I messed up so bad...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A disappointed Mejiro Palmer returns to her
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's the spirit! Now, to the track!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There, I'm all warmed up again. I won't push
myself, promise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That hurts... Man, I guess it was a biggie after
all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: My bad. Sorry for stressing you out even more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer can't continue training after all and
goes back to her dorm with her shoulders
slumped.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer runs so freely that I can't even tell
she's hurt!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... See? Told ya it was nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, her injury turns out to be very minor. She
paces herself well and completes the rest of
today's session without further incident.
